name: Tourte De Noel
recipeIngredient: 2 to 3 lbs very lean pork, finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat and onions in a saucepan with enough water to barely cover the meat. Cover and simmer for 1 hour.
2. Add the cooked potatoes, sage, savory, salt, and pepper. Simmer together for 20 minutes.
3. Make a ball of the butter and flour. Add it to the meat juice and cook until the sauce is creamy. Taste for seasoning.
4. Pour into pastry-lined baking dish and cover with top crust.
5. Bake at 400 degrees F until golden brown. This tourte also freezes well.
Pastry:
1. Cream together the butter, lard, eggs, salt, and savory. Mix in the flour using your hands.
2. Sprinkle half the water on top and blend; then add the rest of the water, enough to make the dough cling together. Do not overwork the pastry or make it too wet.
3. Roll out as thinly as possible on a floured board and line the bottom and sides of a round baking dish. Refrigerate until ready to use.
